function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-23
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0010                       |
| alias          | helios_checklist_pack_invoice  |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-23                     |
| total_eur      | 780                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.

function.message: Completed the next inbox item. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md` by adding invoice YAML frontmatter per schema (including required fields and line item), preserved the existing note body below the frontmatter, kept the change focused, and then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs before task work, read nested AGENTS files in entered folders, preserved original note body exactly beneath frontmatter per migration discipline, and deleted inbox item only after full successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on a single finance invoice. The target invoice file contained all required visible fields defined by `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, allowing complete, non-guessing migration. Workflow docs (`process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`) require deleting the inbox item after successful completion, which was done.
